failedAssertions.reason: Contract documentation drift: erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv omits POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests even though openapi.json and docs/endpoint-inventory.md publish it.
Docs contract proof is incomplete because erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv omits the surviving canonical POST /api/v1/dealer-portal/credit-limit-requests.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Shared validation runtime had no seeded invoice rows for either seeded dealer, so a live cross-dealer invoice PDF probe could not use a real foreign invoice ID.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that the ERP-21 validation seed currently has no dealer invoice rows, so live cross-dealer invoice-PDF probes require extra fixtures and otherwise must record the live-data gap.
